== Notes for [[Item:Q111090|Q111090]] ==

ID: I62244

Name: Andia of Babylon

Given Name: Andia

Surname: of Babylon

Sex: F

_UID: A5BF69E9FCAE404884E0D34F6E945E06D459

Change Date: 26 Nov 2005

Death: Y

Father: Nebuchadnezzar IV of Babylon

Marriage 1 Artaxerxes I of Persia

Married:

Children

Parysatis of Babylon

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I62244

--------------------

Andia, Queen Consort of Persia, was born circa 519 BC; died circa 465 BC.
--------------------
•ID: I62244 •Name: Andia of Babylon •Given Name: Andia •Surname: of Babylon •Sex: F •_UID: A5BF69E9FCAE404884E0D34F6E945E06D459 •Change Date: 26 Nov 2005 •Death: Y

Father: Nebuchadnezzar IV of Babylon

Marriage 1 Artaxerxes I of Persia •Married: Children 1. Parysatis of Babylon

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp%2Dfam&id=I62244

RESEARCH NOTES:
concubine

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per00533.htm#0;
http://www.gbnf.com/genealogy/sahlin/html/d0086/I889.HTM
Bible: Book of Esther

RESEARCH NOTES:
The Babylonian Jewess = the Babylonian concubine who was Darius' mother

OR "ANDRIA"; CONCUBINE

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per01156.htm#0
http://www.gbnf.com/genealogy/sahlin/html/d0134/I2467.HTM

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]]
== Merged content ==
I think she is extremely important in the line into Ancient Egypt[[Category:Pages]]
